Description: Verify the first screen clearly communicates product identity purpose and primary actions
Test Steps: 1) Open http://localhost:5174/ 2) Review branding headings support text and primary CTAs
Expected Result: Product identity secure sign-in purpose and primary entry actions are obvious on first load
Actual Result: Login page showed SafeSignal branding secure-access messaging sign-in heading and clear LOGIN / APPLY ACCESS actions

Description: Verify labeled inputs password visibility toggle and clear sign-in CTA are present and usable
Test Steps: 1) Review email and password labels 2) Enter demo credentials 3) Toggle Show password
Expected Result: Inputs are labeled password can be revealed or hidden and the sign-in CTA is usable
Actual Result: Email and password fields were labeled Show password toggled to Hide password and revealed the password and the SIGN IN button was usable

Description: Verify empty and malformed submissions show actionable feedback
Test Steps: 1) Click SIGN IN with empty fields 2) Enter invalid-email and 123 3) Click SIGN IN again
Expected Result: Required-field and format or length validation messages appear and explain what to fix
Actual Result: Empty submit showed Email is required and Password is required; malformed submit showed Invalid email address and Minimum 6 characters

Test Steps: 1) Enter wrong@example.com and wrongpass 2) Submit the form 3) Wait for server response
Expected Result: Access is denied and an error message is shown
Actual Result: Login stayed on /login and displayed Invalid credentials

Description: Verify visible demo credentials successfully authenticate and redirect to the dashboard
Test Steps: 1) Enter moderator@safesignal.com and password123 2) Submit the form 3) Confirm redirect and authenticated layout
Expected Result: Successful login redirects into the moderator dashboard
Actual Result: Login succeeded and redirected to / with moderator sidebar navigation visible

Description: Verify the access request tab accepts a valid request and returns success feedback
Test Steps: 1) Switch to APPLY ACCESS 2) Enter qa.moderator.20260428 / qa.moderator.20260428@example.com / SecurePass123! with role Moderator 3) Submit request 4) Attempt login with the new credentials
Expected Result: Valid request is accepted with success feedback and remains pending approval
Actual Result: Flow showed REQUEST SUBMITTED; later login with the new credentials was blocked with Account pending admin approval

Test Case Title: Protected route redirect while logged out
Description: Verify protected routes redirect safely when unauthenticated
Test Steps: 1) While logged out open / /reports /users /settings /admin /lei and /data-analysis-center 2) Observe resulting route each time
Expected Result: Protected routes do not render protected content and redirect to login
Actual Result: Each tested protected route redirected to /login and no protected content rendered while logged out

Description: Verify moderator-appropriate navigation is visible and restricted navigation is hidden
Test Steps: 1) Log in as moderator 2) Review sidebar navigation 3) Check for admin and LE links
Expected Result: Moderator nav items are visible and restricted admin and LE nav items are hidden
Actual Result: Dashboard Data Analysis Center Reports Users and Settings were visible; no Admin or LE nav links were shown

Description: Verify moderator access to /admin and /lei is denied safely
Test Steps: 1) While logged in as moderator open /admin 2) Open /lei 3) Observe resulting route and screen
Expected Result: Restricted routes are blocked without exposing restricted screens
Actual Result: Both /admin and /lei redirected back to / and the restricted screens were not exposed

Description: Verify main moderator pages can be opened after login
Test Steps: 1) Log in as moderator 2) Open / /reports /users /settings and /data-analysis-center 3) Check each page for basic render
Expected Result: Main moderator pages load and remain reachable after login
Actual Result: All target moderator pages were reachable during the authenticated session

Description: Verify report totals shown across main moderator screens are internally consistent
Test Steps: 1) Log in as moderator 2) Review dashboard report totals and recent activity 3) Open /reports and review ALL REPORTS count
Expected Result: Report counts across dashboard and reports views are consistent for the same environment
Actual Result: Dashboard showed 47 total reports with recent report activity while Reports showed 0 reports under ALL REPORTS

Description: Verify the dashboard operational map renders without visible failure
Test Steps: 1) Log in as moderator 2) Open dashboard 3) Inspect map panel
Expected Result: Dashboard map renders or degrades gracefully without explicit failure state
Actual Result: Dashboard visibly showed Failed to load Google Maps

Description: Verify a newly requested account is represented consistently across login and user management flows
Test Steps: 1) Submit a new access request 2) Attempt login with the new account 3) Open Users Management and inspect the new account status
Expected Result: A pending account remains pending everywhere until approved
Actual Result: Login blocked the new account as pending admin approval but Users Management listed the same new account as ACTIVE

Description: Verify logout clears the session and protected pages are no longer accessible
Test Steps: 1) Click Logout from authenticated view 2) Confirm redirect to login 3) Open /reports after logout
Expected Result: User is logged out redirected to login and protected routes are blocked again
Actual Result: Logout returned to /login and reopening /reports redirected back to /login

Description: Verify the login view becomes usable within a reasonable local-development time window
Test Steps: 1) Open login page in mobile-emulated viewport 390x844 2) Verify the form renders and is interactable 3) Read navigation timing from the performance API
Expected Result: Login view becomes usable in a reasonable time for local QA
Actual Result: Login form rendered and was usable; recorded timing was about responseEnd 185ms DOMContentLoaded 4331ms and loadEvent 6359ms

Description: Verify the tested flows do not produce uncaught runtime or resource errors
Test Steps: 1) Execute login navigation denial redirect and logout flows 2) Review preserved console messages in DevTools
Expected Result: No uncaught runtime or resource errors occur during the tested flows
Actual Result: Console contained repeated Failed to load resource: net::ERR_PROXY_CONNECTION_FAILED errors along with non-blocking warnings

Description: Verify protected pages do not render while logged out and no unexpected sensitive session data remains exposed
Test Steps: 1) Confirm logged-out protected routes redirect to /login 2) Log out and inspect browser storage 3) Review login page for exposed sensitive info
Expected Result: Protected content is blocked while logged out and no sensitive auth or session data remains exposed beyond intentional demo content
Actual Result: Protected pages redirected correctly; after logout storage only showed moderator_dark_mode=1 and no auth token was observed; only intentional demo credentials were visible on login

Description: Verify the login page remains readable and actionable on a narrow mobile viewport
Test Steps: 1) Open login page in mobile emulation 390x844 2) Review visible content density and form controls 3) Confirm fields and CTA are readable and actionable
Expected Result: Login page remains readable and usable on mobile width
Actual Result: Mobile layout showed a readable sign-in form with visible labels toggle demo credentials and SIGN IN CTA without overlap
